zh.lifeSummary: 當Joseph Morse於1576年11月4日出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親Richard Morse23歲，母親Joan Downes23歲。他於1605年10月29日與Ann Jasper在英國素福爾可蕾格烈芙結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1634年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼沃特托。他去世於1646年9月29日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joseph Morse于1576年11月4日出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲Richard Morse23岁，母亲Joan Downes23岁。他于1605年10月29日与Ann Jasper在英国素福爾可蕾格烈芙结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1634年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼沃特托。他去世于1646年9月29日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可易普斯維其。

nameMeanings.name: Morse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Morris  .
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames, especially   Moses  . Compare   Morris  .
History: Samuel Morse (1791–1872), inventor of the electric telegraph andof Morse code, was a direct descendant of Anthony Morse of Wiltshire,England, who had emigrated to MA in 1635.

variants.name: Morss
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and London): variant of   Morse  .

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Joseph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the biblical Hebrew name Yosef, meaning ‘(God) shall add (another son)’. This was borne by the favourite son of Jacob, whose brothers became jealous of him and sold him into slavery (Genesis 37). He was taken to Egypt, where he rose to become chief steward to Pharaoh, and was eventually reconciled to his brothers when they came to buy corn during a seven-year famine (Genesis 43–7). In the New Testament Joseph is the name of the husband of the Virgin Mary. It is also borne by a rich Jew, Joseph of Arimathea (Matthew 27:57; Mark 15:43; Luke 23:50; John 19:38), who took Jesus down from the Cross, wrapped him in a shroud, and buried him in a rock tomb. According to medieval legend, Joseph of Arimathea brought the Holy Grail to Britain. The name was uncommon in Britain in the Middle Ages but was revived in the mid 16th century and had become popular by the 1630s, remaining so ever since.

variants.name: Josef
meanings: , Dutch, Scandinavian, and Czech spelling of   Joseph  , now also in use in the English‐speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Joseph Morse was born on 4 November 1576, in Suffolk, England, his father, Richard Morse, was 23 and his mother, Joan Downes, was 23. He married Ann Jasper on 29 October 1605, in Redgrave, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He immigrated to Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1634. He died before 29 September 1646, in Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

Il a épousé Ann Jasper le 29 octobre 1605, à Redgrave, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il a immigré au Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1634. it.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Morse è nato il il 4 novembre 1576 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Richard Morse, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Joan Downes, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Ann Jasper il 29 ottobre 1605, nel Redgrave, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Immigrato nel Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1634. Morì prima del 29 settembre 1646, nel Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Joseph Morseが1576年11月4日にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Richard Morseは23歳，母Joan Downesは23歳であった。1605年10月29日にイギリススフォルクレドグラブでAnn Jasperと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1634年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーワテルトウンに移住した。彼は1646年9月29日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスイプスウィチで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joseph Morse(이)가 1576년 11월 4일 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Morse(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Downes(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1605년 10월 29일 영국 수폴크 레지레이브에서 Ann Jasper(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1634년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 왓르타운로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1646년 9월 29일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joseph Morse nasceu em 4 de novembro de 1576, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Morse, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joan Downes, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Jasper em 29 de outubro de 1605, em Redgrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele imigrou para o Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1634. Ele faleceu antes 29 de setembro de 1646, em Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joseph Morse родился 4 ноября 1576 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Morse было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Downes, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Jasper 29 октября 1605 г. в местности реджрав, суффолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он иммигрировал в вэитиртоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1634 году. Он умер перед 29 сентябрь 1646 г. в местности ипсвич, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joseph Morse nació el 4 de noviembre de 1576, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Morse, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Joan Downes, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Ann Jasper el 29 de octubre de 1605, en Redgrave, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Inmigró a Watertown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1634. Murió antes de 29 de septiembre de 1646, en Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
